title: Beille 1pc Natural Beechwood Handheld Citrus Reamer Manual Juicer (6.5 Inches)
description:
Bring fresh citrus flavor into everyday kitchen prep with Beille’s beech wood citrus reamer, a simple and natural tool designed for juicing lemons, limes, oranges and other small citrus fruits by hand. Whether you are adding lemon juice to hot tea, squeezing lime for margaritas and mocktails, or preparing fresh juice for marinades, dressings, sauces, seafood, baking or cooking, this beech wood manual juicer makes the process easy, efficient and controlled.

Beille 1pc Natural Beech Wood Handheld Citrus Reamer Manual Juicer (6.5 Inches)
The pointed reaming head features deep, carved ridges that press into the citrus half to help release juice while separating pulp naturally through the twisting motion. Unlike bulky countertop juicers or electric citrus juicers, this handheld wooden reamer is compact, lightweight, and easy to reach for whenever you need a small amount of fresh juice. The rounded ergonomic handle offers a comfortable grip, giving you better control while pressing and twisting lemons, limes, grapefruit, kiwis, oranges and more.
Key Features
  • BEECH WOOD CITRUS REAMER: Made from smooth beech wood material, this wooden citrus reamer offers a simple, plastic free feel for everyday kitchen prep; ideal for juicing lemons, limes, oranges and other small citrus fruits
  • DEEP CARVED RIDGES FOR JUICING: Pointed reamer head features deep, carved ridges designed to press into citrus halves and easily help release fresh juice by hand; great for tea, cocktails, mocktails, dressings, marinades, baking and cooking
  • COMFORTABLE ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Rounded wooden handle is easy to grip while twisting and pressing citrus fruit; design gives you direct control without relying on other bulky countertop citrus juicers, electric juicers or extra kitchen gadgets
  • COMPACT 6.5 INCH KITCHEN TOOL: Measuring 6.5 inches long and weighing only 0.20lbs, this manual citrus juicer is easy to store in a kitchen drawer, utensil crock bar cart or small space kitchen setup
  • HAND WASH ONLY: Hand wash only and dry promptly after use to preserve the natural wood finish, grain texture and long-lasting kitchen ready appearance
Specifications
MPN: BLE-BV71AZ96
UPC: 810131709051
MATERIAL: Beech Wood
DISHWASHER SAFE: No; hand wash only
LENGTH: 6.5 Inches
WEIGHT: 0.20lbs
Made from smooth beech wood material, this manual citrus reamer has a warm, natural kitchen look that pairs beautifully with wood spoons, linen towels, farmhouse kitchens, bar carts, and every day cooking tools. Measuring 6.5 inches long and weighing only 0.20lbs, it stores easily in a drawer or utensil holder without taking up valuable space. CARE: For best care, hand wash only and dry promptly after use to help preserve the wood grain and finish
